name: build-until-done
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>evaluate>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,deterministic-output |
 lens: contract-evidence-verifier |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: MISSION_GOAL
required_inputs.description: One bounded mission that should either finish or stop with a real blocker.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Exact scope the mission is allowed to touch.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CONDITION
required_inputs.description: Explicit completion contract and the evidence required for each condition.

required_inputs.name: CURRENT_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Current outputs, tests, notes, or observations from prior passes.

required_inputs.name: PLAN_ARTIFACTS
required_inputs.description: Implementation plan, tasks ledger, or execution docs that must be consumed and exhausted during the loop. When present, treat incomplete task rows as active work and keep consuming them until exhausted. When absent, drive iteration from DONE_CONDITION and prompt evidence.

required_inputs.name: COMPANION_SKILLS
required_inputs.description: Narrow code-path companion skills active in this compose chain. Declared by the caller — this skill uses them for next-pass handoff, not internal invocation.

required_inputs.name: MAX_PASSES
required_inputs.description: Safety budget for same-turn iteration. Default to 3, or 8 when PLAN_ARTIFACTS is present.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Time, safety, approval, or non-goal constraints that limit the loop.
